text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MBSF 30 CCW Chronic Conditions (CHRONIC) File │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 
15 
CANCER_BREAST 
LABEL: 
Breast Cancer End-of-Year Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) criteria for 
breast cancer (female or male) as of the end of the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: CANCER_BREAST 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived) 
VALUES: 
0 = Beneficiary did not meet claims criteria
